raw:
{
  "project": "TraderFrame — Evidence Gate",
  "product": "Private trading decision-intelligence experience",
  "audience": ["Independent traders", "Portfolio managers", "Research-led market participants"],
  "business_goal": "Demonstrate TraderFrame's evidence-first decision process through a premium interactive 3D narrative",
  "core_message": "Market conviction becomes credible when evidence is filtered, challenged, approved and recorded transparently",
  "brand_principles": ["Evidence first", "Transparent reasoning", "User control", "Risk awareness", "Calm precision"],
  "stage": "Asset Breakdown",
  "objective": "Create the full asset registry",
  "asset_registry": {
    "environment": {
      "name": "Evidence Gate Nexus",
      "description": "A minimalist, high-precision 3D environment representing the core decision-making interface of TraderFrame. It features a central data visualization hub, modular control panels, and a dynamic evidence wall.",
      "assets": [
        {
          "name": "Data Visualization Hub",
          "type": "3D Model",
          "format": "glTF/GLB",
          "description": "A central, interactive data visualization interface that displays market evidence in real-time. It includes layered data streams, risk indicators, and decision triggers.",
          "source": "Custom-built with Unreal Engine 5.3",
          "license": "Proprietary",
          "dependencies": ["UI Toolkit", "Data Visualization Plugin"]
        },
        {
          "name": "Modular Control Panels",
          "type": "3D Model",
          "format": "glTF/GLB",
          "description": "A set of interactive, modular panels that allow users to filter, challenge, and approve evidence. Each panel has a dedicated function and visual feedback system.",
          "source": "Custom-built with Unreal Engine 5.3",
          "license": "Proprietary",
          "dependencies": ["UI Toolkit", "Panel Interactivity Plugin"]
        },
        {
          "name": "Evidence Wall",
          "type": "3D Model",
          "format": "glTF/GLB",
          "description": "A dynamic, scrollable wall that displays historical and current evidence. It supports real-time updates, user annotations, and transparency layers.",
          "source": "Custom-built with Unreal Engine 5.3",
          "license": "Proprietary",
          "dependencies": ["UI Toolkit", "Dynamic Content Plugin"]
        },
        {
          "name": "Calm Precision UI",
          "type": "3D Model",
          "format": "glTF/GLB",
          "description": "A minimalist UI system that emphasizes clarity, control, and precision. It includes a timeline of evidence, risk indicators, and user control dials.",
          "source": "Custom-built with Unreal Engine 5.3",
          "license": "Proprietary",
          "dependencies": ["UI Toolkit", "Calm Precision Plugin"]
        },
        {
          "name": "Risk Awareness Indicator",
          "type": "3D Model",
          "format": "glTF/GLB",
          "description": "A visual indicator that dynamically changes based on the risk level of the current evidence. It provides real-time feedback to the user.",
          "source": "Custom-built with Unreal Engine 5.3",
          "license": "Proprietary",
          "dependencies": ["UI Toolkit", "Risk Feedback Plugin"]
        }
      ]
    },
    "characters": {
      "name": "TraderFrame User",
      "description": "A generic, stylized user avatar representing the trader or portfolio manager interacting with the Evidence Gate system.",
      "assets": [
        {
          "name": "User Avatar",
          "type": "3D Model",
          "format": "glTF/GLB",
          "description": "A stylized, customizable avatar representing the user. It includes gesture controls and interactive UI elements.",
          "source": "Custom-built with Unreal Engine 5.3",
          "license": "Proprietary",
          "dependencies": ["Avatar System", "Gesture Control Plugin"]
        },
        {
          "name": "User Interaction UI",
          "type": "3D Model",
          "format": "glTF/GLB",
          "description": "A UI system that allows the user to interact with the Evidence Gate interface, including filtering, approving, and annotating evidence.",
          "source": "Custom-built with Unreal Engine 5.3",
          "license": "Proprietary",
          "dependencies": ["UI Toolkit", "Interaction Plugin"]
        }
      ]
    },
    "props": {
      "name": "Evidence Cards",
      "description": "A set of interactive, modular props representing pieces of evidence that can be filtered, challenged, and approved.",
      "assets": [
        {
          "name": "Evidence Card",
          "type": "3D Model",
          "format": "glTF/GLB",
          "description": "A modular, interactive card that represents a piece of market evidence. It includes visual indicators, user annotations, and approval status.",
          "source": "Custom-built with Unreal Engine 5.3",
          "license": "Proprietary",
          "dependencies": ["UI Toolkit", "Card Interaction Plugin"]
        },
        {
          "name": "Evidence Card Holder",
          "type": "3D Model",
          "format": "glTF/GLB",
          "description": "A dynamic holder that displays multiple evidence cards in a scrollable format. It supports real-time updates and user interaction.",
          "source": "Custom-built with Unreal Engine 5.3",
          "license": "Proprietary",
          "dependencies": ["UI Toolkit", "Dynamic Content Plugin"]
        }
      ]
